data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_This: This is our special exhibit hall.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Expl:
As you can plainly see, there is not a
single painting on exhibit.\pHere, I don't wish to exhibit works of
so-called classical art.\pSuch classical works you can see on
our ground floor.\pI wish to exhibit work that is far
different from the classics.\pArt, after all, is not restricted to old,
famous works!\pThis exhibit hall, I wish to fill it with...\pModern and vibrant artworks of
POKéMON seemingly ready to spring\lforth into glorious life!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Plea:
I beg your pardon. I didn't intend
to monopolize the conversation.\pNow, as you are young, and yet
obviously well traveled...\pYou must encounter lively POKéMON
and works of art depicting them.\pIf you were to come across such a
painting, may we ask you to obtain\lthe artist's permission to exhibit\lit here?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Wish: I wish to fill this exhibit hall with\nmodern and vibrant paintings of\lPOKéMON.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Than: Thanks to you, we've added a new\npainting to our collection!\pI've heard it depicts your POKéMON.\nTruly magnificent!\pThank you so very, very much!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Pain:
Isn't this marvelous?
This collection of paintings!\pEach one of them flawless!
None better than another!\pThese paintings have attracted
more guests to our ART MUSEUM.\pSincerely, I thank you, {PLAYER}.
This is my dream come true!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Toke: This is merely a token of my gratitude.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Keep: I will keep this for you until we\nmeet again.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Hono: Ah, so good to see you, {PLAYER}!\pIt's an honor to have you visit us\non your busy journeys.\pPlease, relax and do enjoy your\nvisit with us.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_ItsP: It's a picture frame with pink-colored\nadornments.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_ItsY: It's a picture frame with yellow-colored\nadornments.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_ItsB: It's a picture frame with blue-colored\nadornments.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_ItsR: It's a picture frame with red-colored\nadornments.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_ItsG: It's a picture frame with green-colored\nadornments.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_NewP: I've been away awhile, so the new\npaintings up here surprised me.\pI wish someone would paint my POKéMON\nthis pretty.
Well... So this is where they show the\ntopical POKéMON paintings.\pI see, these new paintings are indeed\nrather amusing.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F.LilycoveCity_LilycoveMuseum_2F_Text_Thes: Wow, is that right?\nThese paintings are of your POKéMON.\pIsn't that just the ultimate joy for\na TRAINER?
